creator: lavr@unix1.jinr.ru
text:
Hardware: ASUS P7P55D LE
CPU: Core i5 661
RAM: 8GB
BIOS: VT-x = Enable , VT-d = Enable

Hardware: ASUS P7P55 LX
CPU: Core i3 540
RAM: 4GB
BIOS: VT-x = Enable , VT-d = Enable

CPU above supported VT-x EPT: VMX, POPCNT (from dmesg)

On both PC FreeBSD 10-RC[X], 10.0-RELEASE, 10-Stable after:

# kldload vmm.ko

PC freeze, keyboard locked
